title: Inju Seisen Twin Angels (uncensored & uncut)
description:
This is a old release indeed, but it still needs a better exposition.  
  
Twin Angels was terribly edited when released in USA.  
Most of the scenes involving Lord Onimaro (the 300 years demon that just looks like a kid) with ecchiness.  
Fortunately italian dudes got it too on VHS, and they didn't cut anything!  
The material is VHS quality, but watchable. I had to edit the american subs to match the unedited version timing. They are provided as external .ssa files, with many "missing dialogue" for the previously missing scenes.   
I hope you enjoy seeing Lord Onimaro much more active on the ecchi side than he was on the R1 DVD!  
  
Not sure that the trackers I used back then are still alive, but it should work with DHT at least.  
  
Other stuff will follow, stay tuned ;-)

The second and third earthquakes that occurred successively have destroyed the city of Tokyo.  
As a result, the new capital city is constructed in the west of the former city. Stretching from the dumped wards such as Shinjuku and Minato under the sea water, the slum districts are formed.
